impact: Creates a deterministic public-guidance source-diff fixture and test that compares two synthetic versions of one PP&D requirement set, proving added, removed, and changed obligations are classified with source citations and confidence values before any live crawl work.
summary: Add fixture-only PP&D source-diff report validation
target_task: Task checkbox-97: Task checkbox-92: Add a fixture-only source-diff report that compares two synthetic versions of one public PP&D requirement and classifies added, removed, and changed obligations with citations and confidence values.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
